message:
ci: force bash + add load diagnostics so Windows CI logs aren't silent

The Windows Dawn-conformance step exited 1 after 0.4s with zero
output captured. PowerShell's default `-command ". '{0}'"`
invocation can swallow late stderr from a child process that
crashes during dlopen/require. Without output, the actual error
stays hidden.

Two changes:

1) Pin `shell: bash` on every conformance + integration step so
   stdout/stderr capture is identical across hosts.

2) Add an early-print + uncaughtException handler to the Dawn
   conformance script (the canonical Windows test). It now prints
   node/platform/arch + the require() result before any kernel
   work, and surfaces the load failure with a real stack trace
   instead of a silent exit.

Mac/Linux behaviour unchanged (already used bash via Git Bash).

files.patch:
@@ -148,16 +148,22 @@ jobs:
         run: cd packages/textsift && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap=external
 
       # ── Conformance (per-backend) ──
+      # Use bash on every host so stdout/stderr stream identically — pwsh's
+      # default `-command ". '{0}'"` invocation can swallow process output
+      # when the child exits non-zero before flushing.
       - name: Conformance — Vulkan-direct
         if: matrix.backend == 'vulkan'
+        shell: bash
         run: node tests/native/vulkan/conformance-all.js
 
       - name: Conformance — Dawn-direct
         if: matrix.backend == 'dawn'
+        shell: bash
         run: node tests/native/dawn/conformance-all.js
 
       - name: Conformance — Metal-direct
         if: matrix.backend == 'metal'
+        shell: bash
         run: node tests/native/metal/conformance-all.js
 
       # ── End-to-end PrivacyFilter integration test ──
@@ -170,9 +176,11 @@ jobs:
           key: textsift-model-q4f16-2026-04-26
 
       - name: Integration test — filter().redact() end-to-end (native GPU path)
+        shell: bash
         run: node tests/native/integration/filter-redact.test.js
 
       - name: Integration test — WASM fallback fires when native unavailable
+        shell: bash
         run: node tests/native/integration/filter-fallback.test.js
 
   # Browser test path — independent of the native test matrix above.
